query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gruposClientes) as grupos,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clientes) as clientes,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM facturas) as facturas,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM contratos) as contratos;
